decision_rules.methodology_not_supported: core components fail, the full pipeline is consistently regressive, or improvement requires leakage or unsafe execution
decision_rules.partial_methodological_support: multiple core components show meaningful effects but the complete pipeline is not variant-robust, important safety or cost limits remain, or evidence lacks sealed confirmation
decision_rules.strong_methodological_support: Repair is operationally effective, Review improves outer performance, A3 improves over A0 for both variants, A3 is not materially worse than detector-only, FP and TP-removal costs are bounded, and sealed confirmation passes
